headline: The U.S. Navy Turned to This Company to Boost Submarine Production
summary: Friday, the U.S. Navy and manufacturing start-up Hadrian announced plans to invest in submarine parts production.

raw.headline: The U.S. Navy Turned to This Company to Boost Submarine Production
raw.summary: Friday, the U.S. Navy and manufacturing start-up Hadrian announced plans to invest in submarine parts production.

headline: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
summary: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

raw.headline: Trump: U.S. could end Iran military operations 'right now' but will continue so Iran can 'never rebuild'
raw.summary: President Donald Trump's comments followed reports that the Pentagon is sending up to 2,500 more Marines to the Middle East from San Diego.

headline: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
summary: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.

raw.headline: Trump invokes emergency powers with $23 billion in Gulf arms sales as Iran war wages on: WSJ report
raw.summary: The U.S. approved roughly $23 billion in weapons sales to three Gulf nations, moving to bolster their defenses as the Middle East war continued to escalate.
